case_title: VICTOR KIM, ARCHITECTURE & PLANNING, INC. VS. HENRY CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VICTOR KIM, ARCHITECTURE & PLANNING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, HENRY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $89.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,089.99, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JUDY CHAN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VICTOR KIM, ARCHITECTURE & PLANNING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, HENRY CHAN, JUDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
